description: Brazilian militias are illegal paramilitary groups primarily in Rio de Janeiro, composed of current and former police officers, firefighters, criminals, and politicians. They operate as mafia-like organizations, engaging in extortion, protection rackets, and other organized crime activities. Emerging in the late 2000s from death squads of the military dictatorship, they have deep political connections and are involved in high-profile assassinations. The group remains active in the Brazilian drug war.
